name: Apple Filled Acorn Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut open the acorn squash and scoop out the seeds.
2. Mix the seeds with diced apples, salt, pepper, and olive oil until well combined.
3. Stuff the acorn squash with the apple mixture.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 45 minutes or until tender.
5. Turn off the oven and let cool before serving.
